name: Cocoa Peppermint Icing
recipeInstructions: Melt the butter in a saucepan. Add the cocoa powder and heat for 1 minute or until smooth, stirring constantly. Alternately add sugar and milk, beating to spreading consistency. Blend in vanilla extract. For added peppermint flavor, mix in 1 tablespoon of crushed peppermint candy when blending in the vanilla extract.
